title: gomphostemma javanicum subsp. lucidum
intro: Gomphostemma javanicum subsp. lucidum is a subspecies of plant belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gomphostemma javanicum subsp. lucidum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extract in capsule form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
